pi_items.source: Consistent usage across all task files: setup_task.sh (container creation), export_result.sh (container state checking), verifier.py (verification logic), and task.json (task description). The container is created in setup_task.sh line 40: 'docker run -d --name test-web-server -p 8080:80 nginx:alpine'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic container named 'test-web-server' that is created during setup from the nginx:alpine image and port-mapped to 8080:80. The verification checks that the container transitions from running to stopped state without being removed.
